data.title: Chewy Posts Q3 Sales Beat: Analysts Say Successful Cyber Week Could Lead To Higher Lifetime Value Customers
data.description: Chewy reports lower sales but healthy active customer growth. Analysts maintain positive outlook and expect higher lifetime value customers from Cyber Week sales.
